findings.description: The entire 構成 h2 section (クラス図, 各クラスの責務, テーブル定義 subsections) is merged into a single section s3. The source 構成 section contains well over 2000 characters of plain text and has multiple h3/h4/h5 sub-headings. Per V3 rules, this warrants splitting (e.g., separating テーブル定義 into its own section). The automated pre-check flagged 'source headings 8 vs knowledge sections 6', and 2 of the unrepresented headings are the sub-sections of 構成.
findings.source_evidence: Source 構成 section contains h3: クラス図, h4: 各クラスの責務 (with h5: インタフェース定義, クラス定義), h5: テーブル定義 — all merged into knowledge s3.

findings.description: Section s5 hints are missing several PascalCase class/interface names that appear in both the XML configuration example and the property description table: `SimpleDbTransactionManager` (used as the dbManager type), `SystemTimeProvider` (the interface for systemTimeProvider), and `BusinessDateProvider` (the interface for businessDateProvider).
findings.source_evidence: Source s5 property table: 'nablarch.core.db.transaction.SimpleDbTransactionManagerクラスのインスタンスを指定する', 'nablarch.core.date.SystemTimeProviderインタフェースを実装したクラス', 'nablarch.core.date.BusinessDateProviderインタフェースを実装したクラス'.
